title: PUtilsFabric
description: A mod to play Challenges like bastighg
body:
## Hey, I'm developing a challenge mod. With this mod on your Server you can play a lot of Challenges. Everything you need to do is puting the mod and its dependencies in the mods folder of your server. 
# Commands:
### /settings <opens the settings gui>
### /timer resume/pause/reset <start or stop the timer>
### /reset <resets the worlds>

# Challenges:
### NoJump (You die if you jump)
### BlockRandomMob (When you break a block a random entity will spawn at your location)

# Attention:
### Use the newest fabric version
### Use the newest minecraft version
### Install all dependencies
